description: List of names followed by numbers, possibly contributions to the poor. May be related to T-S AS 202.369. Mentions Ṣedaqa; Ibn Saʿīd al-[...]; the boys (ṣibyān) of al-[...]; the garment makers (al-thawwābīn); the servants (ghilmān) of the amīr; something in the sūq al-kabīr.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
